info.description: REST API for managing digital media in archival collections.
info.title: Go-Medialog API

get.description: Returns version information about the application and API.
Returns a list of all accessions.

post.description: Creates a new accession within a resource.

get.description: Returns a single accession by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes an accession by its ID.

get.description: Returns paginated entries for a given accession. Use all_ids=true to return only entry UUIDs.
Returns media type totals and per-type summaries for a given accession.

delete.description: Deletes all active web sessions from the database.

get.description: Returns paginated entries across all accessions. Use all_ids=true to return only UUIDs.

post.description: Creates a new media entry within an accession.

get.description: Returns a single media entry by its UUID.

delete.description: Deletes a media entry by its UUID.

post.description: Replaces all updatable fields of an entry by UUID.

patch.description: Updates the storage location for a given entry by UUID.

get.description: Returns total counts and sizes of media ingested within a date range. Dates must be in YYYYMMDD format.
Returns a list of all repositories.
Returns a single repository by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a repository by its ID.

get.description: Returns paginated entries for a given repository. Use all_ids=true to return only entry UUIDs.
Returns media type totals and per-type summaries for a given repository.
Returns a list of all resources.

post.description: Creates a new resource (collection) within a repository.

get.description: Returns a single resource by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a resource by its ID.

get.description: Returns paginated entries for a given resource. Use all_ids=true to return only entry UUIDs.
Returns media type totals and per-type summaries for a given resource.

post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password, returning a session token valid for 3 hours.

created_by.description: this should be converted to a uint

updated_by.description: this should be converted to a uint
